task.title: AgentCtx v2 context-file taxonomy
task.goal: Implement the v2 context-file taxonomy additively while preserving v1 compatibility and a tracked v1 docs snapshot.
constraints: Keep existing CtxBlocks configuration and targets working
Preserve the docs tagline: Agent context for any repo, any framework, and any agent.
Generated output must stay deterministic, token-aware, and secret-safe
Use the dual-agent runner as a step gate after every implementation batch
successCriteria: Universal context files are generated for each context point
Capability files are generated only when relevant or explicitly configured
AGENTS.md remains compact and includes a clear load order
Public outputs exclude non-public-safe context files
CLI planning and explanation commands are available
The v2 docs build from the current docs base and v1 docs remain available for comparison

steps.title: Preserve v1 docs
steps.instructions: Copy the current docs-agentctx source into docs-agentctx-v1 so v1 can be compared after v2 docs changes. Do not wire the snapshot into the v2 docs nav.
successCriteria: docs-agentctx-v1 exists
The v1 snapshot contains the current docs markdown, VitePress config, scripts, and public assets
The v2 docs source remains in docs-agentctx

steps.title: Registry and config
steps.instructions: Add v2 context-file types, registry metadata, default token budgets, public-safe flags, and additive config support for contextFiles and allowUnsafeContextConfig.
successCriteria: Registry definitions are deterministic and exported from @agentctx/core
Existing ctxBlocks config remains supported
Unit tests cover registry basics and config normalization

steps.title: Capability detection and selection
steps.instructions: Derive v2 capabilities from existing graph facts and implement context-file selection with include, exclude, required, and safety enforcement.
successCriteria: Universal files always select
Capability files select only when required capabilities are present or included
Core safety files cannot be excluded unless unsafe config is enabled
Unit tests cover detected, skipped, required, excluded, and unsafe-config cases

steps.title: Renderers and generated outputs
steps.instructions: Render v2 context files from the graph, write them during build, keep legacy CtxBlocks compatible, redact secrets, and update AGENTS.md to use the v2 load order and context map.
successCriteria: Universal and high-value capability files render with useful sections
Generated files are redacted before writing
AGENTS.md stays compact and links to deeper files
llms.txt uses only public-safe context files

steps.title: CLI and cache metadata
steps.instructions: Add agentctx plan, agentctx explain, build --category, build --file, and file-level context metadata in cache/build outputs.
successCriteria: CLI commands support text and JSON output
Build filters accept category and file names
Cache metadata records selected files, input hashes, estimated tokens, and public-safe state
CLI tests cover the new behavior

steps.title: V2 docs and integration fixture
steps.instructions: Update docs-agentctx from the current docs base to explain v2 context files, framework-specific context, plan/explain CLI commands, and public-safe outputs. Add a compact integration fixture for expected v2 output behavior.
successCriteria: Docs preserve the tagline
Docs explain v2 while noting additive CtxBlocks compatibility
The v1 docs snapshot remains unchanged
Typecheck, tests, and build pass
